name: Scorechain
description: Crypto AML and blockchain analytics API for wallet scoring and transaction monitoring.

seo.title: Scorechain — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Scorechain: Crypto AML and blockchain analytics API for wallet scoring and transaction monitoring.

when_to_use: Crypto wallet risk scoring for exchange AML compliance
Transaction monitoring API for crypto business reporting
Blockchain analytics for FATF Travel Rule evidence
On-chain forensics for illicit fund tracing investigations
Risk score API for DeFi protocol deposit screening

pros: Wallet scoring and monitoring across major chains
European company with strong EU compliance fit
Cheaper entry than Chainalysis or TRM
cons: Smaller brand than TRM, Chainalysis, Elliptic
Chain coverage narrower on long-tail assets
review.verdict: European-friendly crypto AML API priced below tier-1 competitors; good option for EU fintechs.
review.best_for: EU crypto exchanges, PSPs and fintechs needing affordable wallet scoring with GDPR comfort
review.not_for: US law enforcement or big exchanges needing deep investigations and broad long-tail coverage

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
